title: LlmJudge Lambda Response
description: Success response schema from the LLM-as-a-Judge Lambda function

overall_score.description: Weighted average score across all criteria. Present only in single-call evaluation; omitted in parallel (per-criterion) mode where no aggregation is applied.

criterion_scores.description: Per-criterion scores keyed by criterion name

criterion_reasoning.description: Per-criterion reasoning keyed by criterion name. When evaluation_steps are defined, each value includes numbered step answers followed by a final summary.

reasoning.description: Overall evaluation reasoning from the judge LLM

judge_model.description: The model name used as judge

examples.reasoning: The response demonstrates strong factual accuracy and is clearly written...
